channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped Lime Bike in grass, 29th April
item.description:
Dumped in grass, looks damaged.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tewkesbury Terrace, New Southgate, London Borough of Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bikes yet again blocking this pedestrian only footpath path, 29th April
item.description:
Remove this bike blocking the footpath and take action on who parked it here. Prevents wheelchair access. On going issue, path needs geolocking.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bounds Green Road, Wood Green, London Borough of Haringey
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Temp lights stick on red both directions, 29th April
item.description:
Lordship lane road works just past the cinema lights causing chaos
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 91, Lordship Lane, East Dulwich, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Spurgeon St, SE1 - Dog fouling, 29th April
item.description:
Please clear up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-20, Spurgeon Street, The Borough, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old furniture dumped, 29th April
item.description:
Old furniture dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Hollydale Road, Nunhead, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Old sofa, 29th April
item.description:
Old sofa dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Brabourn Grove, Nunhead, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Extremely deep pothole just south of here on Weld Place, 29th April
item.description:
Very deep pothole waiting to trip someone up or throw them off their bike. Note this is before the Montmorency Park border. This pot hole has been ignored for too long and is right where you can come across it before it is too late to avoid it.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Weld Place, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytip, 29th April
item.description:
Flytip. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 166, Croydon Road, Anerley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Usual loads of litter dumped at top of Stembridge road, 29th April
item.description:
The usual rubbish littered all over the top of Stembridge road. Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Stembridge Road, Anerley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Street clean request, 29th April
item.description:
There is continually litter dropped down our road which blows onto my property.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westbury Road, Penge, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish all over the pavement, 29th April
item.description:
Someone else suggested a bin here which seems like a good idea.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Road, Beckenham, Bromley, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Permit holder signs taken down, 29th April
item.description:
The T zone permit holder signs have been removed. They are usually sprayed over on numerous occasions! I currently pay for a permit and I cannot usually get a space now due to all other cars without permit which are there! Could you please advise as to when these will be fixed? Thank you

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Peckham Park Road, Peckham, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish blowing down street, 29th April
item.description:
Constant rubbish left here makes a huge mess.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Queensbridge Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car abandoned - no Tax and No MOT, 29th April
item.description:
This car is declared off road but is left on the road without tax and MOT

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13-18, Palace Road, Crystal Palace, London Borough of Bromley
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Opposite bus stop B Queens park station, 29th April
item.description:
Big pothole with sharp edges in the middle of the road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Premier Corner, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead young Fox by edge of road, 29th April
item.description:
Not been there long

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Okemore Gardens, St Mary Cray, Orpington, London Borough of Bromley

item.description:

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Southwold Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Litter on pavement, 29th April
item.description:
Broken bin bag, litter scattered over pavement
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stratheden Parade, Blackheath
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Forcing people on to the road, 29th April
item.description:
This is an ongoing problem the van does not fit in the drive so he simply blocks the path

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Illegal waste disposal, 29th April
item.description:
Someone is dumping their motor oil into this sand receptacle, creating a hazard.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southwark Bridge Road, The Borough, London Borough of Southwark
Report on FixMyStreet
